name: Lentil Vegetable Soup
description: A nutritious vegan soup with lentils and seasonal vegetables
ingredients:
lentils
spinach
tomatoes
carrots
onion
cumin
vegetable broth
directions: Sauté onion and spices. Add lentils and broth. Simmer 30 minutes.
notes: Great for meal prep. Keeps 5 days in the fridge.
